# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
  vnetName:
  subnetName:
  vmCount:
  vmSize:
  osDiskType:
  storageAccountType:
  publicIpPrefix:

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: 2022-07-01
    name: pipPrefix
    location: westus
    properties:
      sku:
        name: Standard

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: 2022-11-01
    name: vm-*
    location: westus
    dependsOn:
      - [sub, vmStorage]
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: $vmSize
      osDisk:
        createOption: FromImage
        vhd:
          storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
          containerName: whs-vhds
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: [subnetResourceId]
            properties:
              primary: true
      osProfile:
        adminUsername: developer

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: 2022-07-01
    name: nic-*
    location: westus
    dependsOn:
      - [vm]
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig1
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            subnet:
              id: [subnetResourceId]

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets
    apiVersion: 2022-11-01
    name: vmSs
    location: westus
    dependsOn:
      - [pips]
    properties:
      upgradePolicy:
        mode: Automatic
      singlePlacementGroup: false

outputs:
  publicIPPrefixResourceId: {
    value: $publicIpPrefix
  }
